sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni su postali osnovni dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones have become an essential part of our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةَ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ove uređaje kako bismo lako komunicirali s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: We use these devices to communicate with friends and family easily.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّهَا تُسَاعِدُنَا فِي الْبَحْثِ عَنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ وَإِنْجَازِ الْأَعْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Također nam pomažu u traženju informacija i obavljanju poslova.
sentences.translationEn: They also help us search for information and complete tasks.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي النَّاسُ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً فِي تَصَفُّحِ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi provode duge sate pregledajući različite aplikacije.
sentences.translationEn: People spend long hours browsing various applications.
